subcodes.first_line: Today, this man [Mírzá Muhammad-`Alí] has done such a deed and written in such wise that Mutisarrif Pasha wanted to use his statement as evidence to uproot Us completely. He has written
subcodes.subjects: @law of inheritance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
